title: Spear to Mallow
description: Changed Wooden Spear to Marshmallow because why not
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2035d4cda3011d1f421cdd153be197323be4e051.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YrdTMDSS44o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Changed Wooden Spear to Marshmallow so you can sit down and have some roasted mallow.

![roast2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JJUTtguh/images/5c0dc012986c54cd97ac4db65e80cae563f0e4ac.gif)
